codeReview.summary: All 3 bug fixes were implemented correctly in both SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md and AGENTS.md. Changes are minimal, targeted, and address each reported bug with clear instructions.

VAL-FIX-001.evidence: SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md now contains: '**Delivery recap:** Saat konfirmasi pesanan delivery, format shareloc sebagai Google Maps link: `https://maps.google.com/?q={lat},{lng}`. Contoh: `Delivery ke: https://maps.google.com/?q=-6.575756,107.464066`. JANGAN tampilkan koordinat mentah seperti `-6.575756, 107.464066`.' (line ~101)

VAL-FIX-002.evidence: SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md now contains: '**WAJIB cek harga dari `menu-schema.json` — JANGAN hitung/tebak dari memory.** `menu-schema.json` adalah satu-satunya sumber kebenaran untuk harga.' (line ~20)

VAL-FIX-003.evidence: SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md contains full QRIS non-delivery procedure under '⚠️ QRIS Tidak Sampai:' section with apologize → retry → fallback to COD flow. AGENTS.md line 27 also documents: 'QR tidak sampai ("mana QR-nya?", "belum terkirim") → minta maaf, coba kirim ulang; gagal lagi → tawarkan COD (delivery only)'

summary: All 3 bug fixes correctly implemented. VAL-FIX-001 (maps link format), VAL-FIX-002 (pricing from schema), and VAL-FIX-003 (QRIS non-delivery handling) are all satisfied with clear, actionable instructions in both SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md and AGENTS.md.
